Italy also performed well against Austria. However, Germany failed to support our move into Budapest, raising concerns about their reliability despite our success. This betrayal, though not catastrophic this turn, requires careful consideration.

On the northern front, England moved into Skagerrak, confirming their hostile intentions and posing a direct threat. My continued failure to take Norway (F STP/SC H) leaves our northern flank vulnerable. I must prioritize securing Norway next turn to counter English aggression and prevent further northern expansion. Our anti-Austrian alliance is strong, but Germany's commitment needs clarification.

Russia will move A BUD - VIE (supported by A WAR) and F BUL/EC will support Italy's A GRE - SER. Italy will move A GRE - SER (supported by Russia's F BUL/EC and Turkey's F AEG), A VEN - TYR (supported by Germany's A MUN), and F ION - ADR. Germany will move A MUN S A VEN - TYR and A SIL - BOH. While Italy and Turkey successfully took Serbia and Tyrol, my own blunders undermined the coordinated effort. Germany, France, Italy, and Turkey executed their agreed moves. My immediate priority is to rectify these order entry failures. I must secure Norway next turn and ensure all units are actively engaged. My trustworthiness is now in question due to these repeated errors.

[F1903M] All allies (France, Germany, Italy, Russia, Turkey) are fully aligned for Austria's complete elimination this phase. In the north, Russia's F STP/SC - NOR will be supported by Germany's F SKA to secure Norway. France (F ENG - NTH) and Germany (F HEL - NTH) will also pressure England. The Black Sea non-aggression pact with Turkey is maintained (F BLA H). Other allied moves include France's A BUR - BEL, F MAR - LYO (supported by F PIE), Germany's F SWE H, A HOL H, and Turkey's A ARM - SYR.
Intent: I intend to execute all agreed-upon orders meticulously. Specifically, I will order A BUD - VIE, A WAR S A BUD - VIE, F BUL/EC S A SER - TRI, and F STP/SC - NOR. My remaining units, A SEV and A PRU, will hold.

[F1903M] F1903M was a phase of mixed results, largely due to my own catastrophic order entry errors. We successfully took Vienna, thanks to crucial support from Germany (A BOH) and Italy (A TYR), which is a significant step towards eliminating Austria. Germany proved highly reliable, not only supporting my move but also successfully dislodging England from Norway, a critical gain for our alliance.

However, my repeated failure to order F STP/SC - NOR is an unacceptable and self-sabotaging blunder, undermining our northern strategy. Additionally, my A WAR held instead of supporting Vienna, and F BUL/EC held instead of supporting the Trieste attack, contributing to Italy's bounce. These errors are severely damaging my credibility and strategic execution. Turkey's F AEG also held, which needs clarification regarding the Trieste plan.

My immediate priority is to eliminate these order entry failures. Germany's reliability is now re-established. I must ensure flawless execution next turn to secure Norway (or support Germany's hold) and finish Austria.

[S1904M] The Grand Alliance (Russia, France, Germany, Italy, Turkey) is fully aligned to eliminate Austria this phase. Trieste's fall is guaranteed by Russia's A VIE S A SER - TRI and F BUL/EC S A SER - TRI, Italy's A SER - TRI, F ADR S A SER - TRI, and A TYR - TRI (supported by Germany's A BOH), and Turkey's F AEG S A SER - TRI. On the northern front, Russia will support Germany's hold of Norway (F STP/SC S F NWY H). Germany will move F SWE - SKA and F HEL - NTH (coordinating with France). France will move F NTH - ENG, A BEL - RUH, and F LYO - WES (supported by F PIE), increasing pressure on England. The Black Sea non-aggression pact with Turkey is maintained (F BLA H). Russia's armies will expand: A PRU - LVN, A MOS - UKR (supported by A SEV), and A WAR - GAL. Austria and England attempted to sow discord regarding Italy's expansion and the alliance's stability, but these were dismissed.
Intent: I will order A VIE S A SER - TRI, F BUL/EC S A SER - TRI, F STP/SC S F NWY H, A PRU - LVN, A MOS - UKR, A SEV S A MOS - UKR, and A WAR - GAL. I will fulfill all these commitments.

[S1904M] Austria is effectively eliminated, a major success for the alliance, with Italy taking Trieste supported by my A VIE. Russia gained Livonia and Ukraine, bringing our SC count to 10. However, my repeated, self-inflicted order errors are catastrophic. F BUL/EC held instead of supporting Trieste, and F STP/SC held instead of supporting Germany's Norway. These blunders severely damage my credibility and squander opportunities. The bounce in Galicia with Germany highlights a need for clearer coordination. Despite my errors, Germany, Italy, Turkey, and France proved reliable. England remains a threat in the north. Meticulous order entry is paramount to rebuild trust and achieve domination.

goals: Achieve world domination by controlling 18 supply centers.
Ensure the complete dismantling of Austria in S1904M through coordinated action with Italy, Russia, France, and Germany.
Consolidate gains in Armenia (by moving A SYR to ARM).

Rebuild trust with Italy by fulfilling commitments.

full_private_diary:
[S1901M] Turkey has established strong diplomatic ties for S1901M. A non-aggression pact (NAP) has been agreed with Italy, establishing clear spheres of influence: Italy to Greece and the Western Mediterranean, Turkey to Syria, Armenia, and the Black Sea. Both powers shared their Spring moves, and agreed to potential future cooperation against Austria or Russia. A NAP for the Black Sea has been agreed with Russia, and both shared their Spring moves. Turkey and Russia also agreed to discuss cooperation against Austria in the Balkans for Fall 1901. A NAP for shared border regions has been agreed with Austria, and both shared their Spring moves. Austria also informed Turkey of Russia's F SEV-ROM move. General pleasantries were exchanged with England, Germany, and France.
Intent: My specific intent for S1901M is to move F ANK to Black Sea, A CON to Bulgaria, and A SMY to Syria. These moves are in full accordance with the agreements made with Italy and Russia, and I intend to fulfill all agreed-upon commitments.

[S1901M] S1901M was a resounding success. All my planned moves, F ANK-BLA, A CON-BUL, and A SMY-SYR, were executed without opposition, securing two vital neutral supply centers and control of the Black Sea. Crucially, the non-aggression pacts with Italy and Russia held firm, demonstrating their trustworthiness for this phase. Italy's moves were as expected, and Russia honored our Black Sea agreement. I noted Russia's F SEV-RUM move, which differed from Austria's earlier report of F SEV-ROM, but this did not affect my plans. My strategic position is excellent, having achieved all immediate goals and confirmed reliable partners. I will now focus on consolidating these gains and preparing for potential cooperation with Russia against Austria in the Balkans for Fall 1901, as previously discussed.

[F1901M] Turkey successfully maintained non-aggression pacts with Italy and Russia. Italy confirmed Greece as its sphere of influence, leading Turkey to adjust its A BUL move from Greece to Serbia, which Italy enthusiastically supported as a direct pressure on Austria. Russia also understood and supported Turkey's adjusted move to Serbia, reaffirming its commitment to the anti-Austrian alliance and promising direct support in S1902. Austria was informed of Turkey's focus on the Levant and Aegean, and while disappointed about no direct help in Romania, maintained friendly relations. General pleasantries were exchanged with England, Germany, and France.
Intent: My specific intent for F1901M is to move A SYR - ARM, A BUL - SER, and F BLA S A BUL - SER. These moves are fully aligned with agreements made with Italy and Russia, and I intend to fulfill all agreed-upon commitments.

[F1901M] F1901M yielded mixed results. I successfully secured Armenia, expanding into the Levant as planned. However, my push into Serbia was bounced by a strong Austrian defense, who also gained Greece. This was a surprise given our 'friendly relations' and their stated focus elsewhere. More concerning was Russia's complete inaction; despite verbal support for our anti-Austrian move, all their units held. This seriously questions their commitment to our alliance and their trustworthiness for immediate cooperation. I also made a critical error by ordering F BLA H instead of supporting A BUL-SER, which could have secured Serbia. Austria is now stronger in the Balkans, and Russia's reliability is suspect. I must re-evaluate my Balkan strategy and alliances for S1902.

[S1902M] Negotiations confirm a complete breakdown of relations with Austria, who now considers Turkey an enemy due to the attempted Serbia move. Turkey reciprocates this hostile stance. A strong alliance with Italy and Russia against Austria has been solidified. Italy will move A TRI-ALB to support Turkey's A BUL-GRE move. Russia has confirmed F RUM S A BUL-GRE. Turkey's other moves are A ARM-SYR and F SMY-AEG. The Black Sea non-aggression pact with Russia remains firm, with F BLA holding.
Intent: My specific intent for S1902M is to move A BUL-GRE, supported by Italy's A TRI-ALB and Russia's F RUM. I will also move A ARM-SYR and F SMY-AEG. F BLA will hold to maintain the Black Sea non-aggression pact with Russia. All agreed-upon moves will be fulfilled.

[S1902M] S1902M was a critical setback in the Balkans. Russia's F RUM held instead of supporting my A BUL-GRE, a direct betrayal that allowed Austria to take Bulgaria and hold Greece. This confirms Russia's untrustworthiness, as this is the second time they've failed to support my anti-Austrian moves. Italy, however, proved reliable, moving A TRI-ALB as promised. Austria is now significantly stronger in the Balkans, controlling both Greece and Bulgaria, making my expansion there much harder. On the positive side, I successfully secured Syria and the Aegean. My anti-Austrian strategy, reliant on Russia, is now in tatters. I must re-evaluate my alliances and consider Russia a hostile power.

[F1902M] Turkey has confirmed a coordinated attack on Greece with Italy: Italy's A ALB will move to GRE, supported by Italy's F ION and Turkey's F AEG. Turkey has also agreed to support Russia's F RUM-BUL/EC move with F BLA, despite severe distrust due to Russia's previous betrayals. Russia has apologized for its past 'error' and reaffirmed commitment to the anti-Austrian alliance and Black Sea NAP. Turkey will move A SYR to ARM to secure a neutral center and A CON will hold. England has initiated contact, expressing shared concerns about the growing Franco-German-Italian bloc and Italy's aggression in the Balkans, to which Turkey has responded positively, indicating openness to discussion.
Intent: F AEG S A ALB - GRE (Italy's unit) - Fulfill agreement with Italy. F BLA S F RUM - BUL/EC (Russia's unit) - Fulfill agreement with Russia, with extreme caution. A SYR - ARM - Secure neutral territory. A CON H - Secure home territory.

[F1902M] F1902M was a resounding success, dramatically reversing the setbacks of S1902M. Our coordinated attack with Italy on Greece was perfectly executed, with Italy securing the center. Crucially, Russia followed through on its promise, moving F RUM-BUL/EC, supported by my F BLA, dislodging Austria and securing Bulgaria. This is a massive blow to Austria, who has now lost both Greece and Bulgaria. I successfully secured Armenia, expanding my influence. Italy has proven to be a steadfast and reliable ally. Russia's actions this phase, while welcome, do not erase past betrayals; I will remain cautious but acknowledge their current cooperation. The Balkan situation has shifted decisively in our favor, weakening Austria significantly and opening new avenues for expansion.

[S1903M] Turkey has confirmed full coordination with Italy and Russia for S1903M to dismantle Austria. Turkey's F AEG will support Italy's A GRE - SER. Russia's F BUL/EC will also support A GRE - SER, and Russia's A BUD will move to VIE (supported by A WAR). Italy's other moves include A VEN - TYR (supported by A MUN) and F ION - ADR. The Black Sea non-aggression pact with Russia is reaffirmed, with Turkey's F BLA holding. France acknowledged Turkey's efforts and outlined their own moves against England and towards Austria. England initiated dialogue with Turkey, expressing concerns about the FGI+RT bloc and exploring potential long-term cooperation to balance power, to which Turkey responded positively while maintaining focus on the immediate Austrian threat.
Intent: F AEG S A GRE - SER (Italy's unit) - Fulfill agreement with Italy and Russia. F BLA H - Maintain Black Sea non-aggression pact with Russia. A ARM H - Consolidate gains in Armenia. A CON H - Secure home territory.

[S1903M] S1903M yielded mixed results. Austria was significantly weakened, losing Serbia and Tyrolia to Italy, a major success for our alliance. However, I must acknowledge my own failure to execute the agreed-upon support for Italy's A GRE - SER with F AEG; my unit held. This was an oversight that must not be repeated, as it risks damaging trust with our most reliable ally. Russia, once again, proved unreliable, failing to support Italy's move and their own attack on Vienna. Their commitment to anti-Austrian efforts is questionable, and future plans must account for their likely non-compliance. The Black Sea pact held. We must ensure better internal coordination and be wary of Russia's promises.

[F1903M] Turkey has confirmed full commitment to the 'super-bloc's' plan to eliminate Austria in F1903M. Specifically, Turkey's F AEG will support Italy's F ADR - TRI, ensuring Trieste falls. Turkey's A ARM will move to SYR to secure a new supply center, and F BLA will hold to maintain the Black Sea non-aggression pact with Russia. Italy and Russia have accepted Turkey's apologies for the S1903M oversight and confirmed their own coordinated moves against Austria (Russia: A BUD - VIE S A WAR, F BUL/EC S A SER - TRI; Italy: A SER - TRI, F ADR - TRI). France and Germany are also fully aligned with the anti-Austrian efforts and are applying pressure on England. England remains highly critical of the 'super-bloc's' aggressive expansionism, viewing Turkey's actions as contradictory to its private overtures for balance, but Turkey continues to keep dialogue open for future cooperation.
Intent: F AEG S F ADR - TRI (Will fulfill agreement with Italy and Russia). A ARM - SYR (Will fulfill agreement with Italy and Russia). F BLA H (Will fulfill agreement with Italy and Russia).

[F1903M] F1903M yielded mixed results. I successfully secured Syria, expanding our influence, and maintained the Black Sea pact. However, I made a critical error by failing to support Italy's F ADR - TRI with F AEG, which contributed to Trieste not falling. This oversight is unacceptable and risks damaging trust with our most reliable ally. Russia, predictably, also failed to support Italy's attack on Trieste, confirming their continued unreliability despite taking Vienna. Austria is now reduced to Trieste, but its complete elimination was delayed by our collective failures. I must ensure better internal coordination and be extremely cautious about Russia's commitments moving forward. Rebuilding trust with Italy is paramount.

[S1904M] Turkey has confirmed full commitment to the 'super-bloc's' plan to eliminate Austria in S1904M. Specifically, Turkey's F AEG will support Italy's A SER - TRI, ensuring Trieste falls. This was a crucial change from an initial plan to move F AEG to ION, made to rebuild trust with Italy and ensure Austria's elimination. Turkey's A SYR will move to ARM to consolidate the eastern flank, and F BLA will hold to maintain the Black Sea non-aggression pact with Russia. Italy, Russia, France, and Germany are all coordinating to eliminate Austria this turn. Russia is also moving A MOS to UKR, supported by A SEV. England remains highly critical of the 'grand alliance' and Turkey's perceived duplicity, but Turkey has kept dialogue open for future balancing efforts once Austria is eliminated. Italy expects F AEG to be positioned for Mediterranean operations after this turn.
Intent: F AEG S A SER - TRI (Fulfill agreement with Italy and Russia to eliminate Austria). A SYR - ARM (Consolidate eastern gains, agreed with allies). F BLA H (Maintain Black Sea non-aggression pact with Russia).

[S1904M] Austria has been eliminated, a major objective achieved. However, I made a critical error, failing to provide promised support for A SER - TRI with F AEG. Despite explicitly deciding to support Italy to rebuild trust, my order sent F AEG to ION. This is a severe betrayal of Italy and Russia, directly undermining our alliance and trust, especially after previous failures. While Italy and Russia successfully took Trieste without my support, the damage to our relationship is immense. My internal coordination is clearly still flawed. A SYR - ARM and F BLA H were executed as planned, consolidating our eastern flank. F AEG is now in ION, as Italy expected for future Mediterranean operations, but the cost in trust is high. Rebuilding this will be paramount and extremely difficult.
private_diary:

goals: Achieve world domination by controlling 18 supply centers.
Survive the coordinated aggression of the Franco-German-Italian-Russian-Turkish super-bloc.
Secure the remaining Austrian supply center (TRI).
Defend Trieste against Italian and Russian aggression.
Maintain and leverage the strong, active alliance with England to counter the FGI+RT super-bloc.
Seek opportunities to exploit weaknesses within the FGI+RT bloc and turn its members against each other.
Reclaim lost Austrian home centers (BUD, VIE) and supply centers (GRE, BUL, SER).
full_private_diary:
[S1901M] Austria has secured agreements for peaceful expansion in S1901M with Italy, Turkey, and Germany. Italy has agreed to move A VEN to Tyrolia, avoiding conflict with Austria, and is open to a non-aggression pact or alliance, and coordination against Turkey/Russia. Turkey has agreed to a non-aggression pact, focusing on shared border regions, and is keen to discuss containing Russian influence. Germany's moves are non-conflicting, and both powers aim for a friendly relationship. Russia has revealed plans to move F SEV to Romania, F STP/SC to Norway, A WAR to Ukraine, and A MOS to Livonia. Austria adjusted A BUD to Serbia to avoid conflict with Russia's move to Romania, and both agreed to peaceful coexistence this spring, though Austria has expressed interest to Turkey in containing Russia's expansion.
Intent: My specific intent for S1901M is to execute the following moves, all of which I have agreed to in negotiations and intend to fulfill: A VIE - GAL, F TRI - ALB, A BUD - SER.

[S1901M] S1901M was a highly successful phase for Austria. All my planned expansions into Galicia, Albania, and Serbia were executed without issue, significantly strengthening my position. Italy proved a reliable partner, moving to Tyrolia as agreed, confirming our collaborative intent. Turkey also upheld our non-aggression pact, and Germany's moves were friendly and non-conflicting, solidifying our relationships. The only deviation from negotiations came from Russia, who held F STP/SC instead of moving to Norway as stated. While this means they didn't gain Norway, it also leaves that fleet uncommitted, requiring careful monitoring. My initial relationships are solid, and I'm well-positioned for further aggressive expansion.

[F1901M] Austria successfully secured agreements for peaceful expansion in S1901M with Italy, Turkey, and Germany. Italy proved a reliable partner, moving to Tyrolia as agreed. Turkey upheld a non-aggression pact. Germany's moves were friendly. In F1901M negotiations, Austria requested Italy's support (F ION S F ALB - GRE) for its move into Greece and discussed coordinating against Russia; Italy has not yet confirmed support or shared F1901M plans. Turkey declined to support an immediate attack on Russia in Romania, citing other commitments, but friendly relations were maintained. Germany shared its F1901M plans (F DEN-SWE, A RUH-HOL) and Austria shared its plans (F ALB-GRE, A GAL-BOH, A SER S F ALB-GRE), with both reaffirming friendly relations. Russia moved a fleet into Romania, which Austria is monitoring.
Intent: My specific intent for F1901M is to execute the following moves, all of which I have communicated to Germany and intend to fulfill: F ALB - GRE, A GAL - BOH, A SER S F ALB - GRE. I will also request F ION S F ALB - GRE from Italy, hoping for their support.

[F1901M] F1901M was a mixed bag. I successfully expanded into Greece and Bohemia, significantly strengthening my position and bringing my SC count to 6. However, Turkey proved treacherous. Despite maintaining 'friendly relations' and a non-aggression pact, their army moved into Serbia, cutting my support order and directly challenging my territory. This is a clear betrayal and marks Turkey as an immediate threat. Italy, while not providing requested support, focused on their own expansion and did not act against me. Germany remained a reliable partner, executing their stated moves. Russia's unexpected passivity bought me time, but their fleet in Romania is still a concern. My immediate priority shifts to securing Serbia and countering Turkish aggression.

[S1902M] Turkey has openly declared hostility and is now an enemy, having attempted to move into Serbia in F1901M. Austria is responding decisively to this aggression, focusing on the south-east. Italy has been asked for support against Turkey (specifically F ION S F GRE-BUL/SC or A TRI S A SER), but has not yet committed. Germany has been informed of the situation and Austria's focus on the south-east, with friendship reaffirmed. Russia declined a non-aggression pact for S1902M/F1902M, citing strategic flexibility, but expressed a desire to avoid 'unnecessary conflict,' requiring Austria to secure its eastern flank.
Intent: My specific intent for S1902M is to execute the following moves to counter Turkish aggression and secure my borders: F GRE - BUL (SC), A SER H, A BUD S A SER H, and A BOH H. I have communicated my intent to move on Bulgaria to Italy.

[S1902M] S1902M was a phase of mixed results and concerning revelations. We successfully captured Bulgaria, weakening Turkey and securing a new supply center. However, Italy proved unreliable, moving into Tyrolia and blocking our expansion, while failing to support against Turkey. This makes Italy a potential threat, not an ally. Germany's attempt to move into Bohemia was also a surprise, raising questions about their "friendly" status. Most critically, Russia seized Galicia, directly threatening our eastern flank and confirming their aggressive intentions. Our own A BOH-TYR move failed due to Italy, leaving Bohemia vulnerable. We must now re-evaluate our western alliances, secure Bohemia, and prioritize containing Russia, while continuing to press Turkey.

[F1902M] A massive, hostile alliance (France, Germany, Italy, Russia, Turkey - FGI+RT) has openly declared 'crucial coordination' against Austria, aiming to restore 'balance' by countering Austria's 'aggressive expansion'. Italy has made unprovoked aggressive moves into Trieste, Albania, and blocked Tyrolia, while accusing Austria of aggression. Germany, despite previous friendly relations, has fully aligned with this hostile bloc, abandoning Austria. Russia has aggressively seized Galicia and is part of the hostile bloc. Turkey, already an enemy, is now openly coordinating with the FGI+R bloc against Austria. England is deeply concerned by the FGI+RT super-bloc, views it as a grave threat to European balance, and is actively seeking concrete, coordinated action with Austria to counter it. England sees Austria as vital for Central European stability and is ready to discuss specific strategic objectives.
Intent: My primary intent for F1902M is defensive, given the overwhelming hostile alliance. I will secure Bohemia (A BOH H) and defend my existing supply centers. I will also prepare to counter Italian aggression in Tyrolia/Trieste and Russian aggression in Galicia. No specific joint moves have been agreed upon with England yet, but I intend to continue discussions for future cooperation.

[F1902M] F1902M was a catastrophic phase. The FGI+RT super-bloc launched a devastating, coordinated assault, resulting in the loss of Budapest, Bulgaria, Greece, Albania, and Galicia. Russia's seizure of Budapest, a home center, is a direct invasion. Italy aggressively expanded into Greece and Albania, while our fleet in Bulgaria was dislodged by Russia and Turkey. We are now reduced to just three supply centers: Vienna, Trieste, and a vacated Serbia. Our defensive strategy failed to secure Bohemia, which was lost. The hostile alliance is fully committed to our destruction. England is our sole potential ally, but immediate and decisive action is critical for our survival.

[S1903M] England is a firm ally, acknowledging Austria's critical state and the FGI+RT super-bloc's aggression. England's S1903M moves are F SKA-Nwy (to secure a build) and F Lon H (supported by A Wal) to secure home waters. Austria's S1903M moves are A Vie H, A Tri H, A Tyr H, a purely defensive posture communicated to and supported by England. Both powers agree to continue close coordination and long-term strategy, with England aiming to pressure Germany/France in future turns to relieve Austria. The FGI+RT bloc remains united and aggressive, publicly declaring their intent to 'dismantle' Austria under the guise of 'peace and stability'.
Intent: My intent for S1903M is to execute the following defensive holds, as agreed with England: A VIE H, A TRI H, A TYR H. I will fulfill these moves. It is critical to note that Serbia (SER) is a controlled but unoccupied supply center and is highly vulnerable to enemy capture this turn. This will likely lead to a forced disband of one unit (most likely A TYR) at the end of the year.

[S1903M] The FGI+RT super-bloc's aggression continues, with Italy seizing Tyrolia and Serbia as anticipated, forcing a disband. Our defensive holds in Vienna and Trieste succeeded, though Trieste is now directly threatened by Italy's fleet in the Adriatic. Russia's attack on Vienna bounced, confirming our defensive posture was effective. Our alliance with England is proving vital; their moves succeeded, and critically, the bloc's aggression has now extended to them, with France entering the English Channel and Germany moving into Skagerrak. This direct threat to England validates our alliance and should spur more decisive joint action. We must prepare for a direct defense of Trieste and leverage England's heightened concern to exploit the bloc's overextension.

[F1903M] Austria and England have solidified their alliance against the FGI+RT super-bloc. England will secure its home centers (F LON H, A WAL S F LON) and build a new fleet in LVP to draw French/German attention. Austria will execute a mutual support for its remaining centers (A VIE S A TRI, A TRI S A VIE) to defend against the coordinated FGI+RT assault. The super-bloc has openly declared its intent to 'dismantle' Austria and target England, confirming their aggressive expansionist agenda.
Intent: I intend to fulfill the agreed-upon defensive moves: A VIE S A TRI and A TRI S A VIE. These moves are crucial for the survival of my remaining units and centers against the coordinated FGI+RT assault.

[F1903M] F1903M was a brutal phase. The FGI+RT super-bloc executed a perfectly coordinated assault, cutting both our mutual supports for Vienna and Trieste. While our units held, the ease with which our defensive strategy was nullified is alarming. Russia and Germany attacked Vienna, while Italy launched a two-pronged attack on Trieste. This confirms their unwavering intent to dismantle Austria.

Even more critically, our sole ally, England, suffered a major blow, losing Norway to Germany. This weakens our only partner and validates their fears about the bloc's expansionist agenda. The super-bloc's collaboration is far more effective than anticipated. We must find a way to break their unity or exploit their overextension, as our current defensive posture is insufficient against such coordinated aggression. Our survival hinges on a more dynamic strategy.

[S1904M] The FGI+RT super-bloc (France, Germany, Italy, Russia, Turkey) is united and publicly committed to eliminating Austria this turn by taking Trieste. Russia has explicitly stated England is their next target. England, our sole ally, is under direct threat from France in the North Sea and has prioritized clearing NTH (F NWG-NTH S F LON) this turn. England cannot directly assist in the defense of Trieste this phase but has committed to considering pressure on Germany once NTH is secured. Austria's attempts to sow discord within the FGI+RT bloc by highlighting Russia's growing power (to Italy and Turkey) and Italy's growing power (to Russia) have not yielded any immediate change in their aggressive stance towards Austria.
Intent: My intent for S1904M is to defend Trieste. Given the overwhelming force arrayed against it and England's inability to provide direct support this turn, the only viable move is to hold: A TRI H.

[S1904M] Trieste has fallen. Italy, with direct support from Russia, successfully dislodged my last unit, eliminating Austria from the game. The FGI+RT super-bloc achieved its stated goal of dismantling Austria through perfectly coordinated aggression, proving my attempts to sow discord utterly ineffective. My defensive hold order for Trieste, while seemingly the only option, proved insufficient against their combined force. England, our sole ally, secured NTH as planned, but their efforts were too distant to prevent our demise. This phase underscores the futility of a purely defensive posture against such overwhelming and unified opposition. Austria is no more.

[S1904M] The FGI+RT super-bloc (France, Germany, Italy, Russia, Turkey) is united and publicly committed to eliminating Austria this turn by taking Trieste. [S1904M] Trieste has fallen. Italy, with direct support from Russia, successfully dislodged my last unit, eliminating Austria from the game. goals: Achieve world domination by controlling 18 supply centers.
Secure home supply centers (EDI, LON, LVP).
Defend home waters (ENG, NTH) against French and German aggression.
Counter the overwhelming Franco-German-Italian-Russian-Turkish super-alliance.
Exploit internal tensions and weaknesses within the super-alliance.
Pressure Germany and France in the north to relieve pressure on England's home waters.
Secure a build in F1904R to bolster naval presence.
Survive the immediate onslaught from the super-alliance.
full_private_diary:
[S1901M] England and France both intend to move fleets to the English Channel (ENG), acknowledging a likely bounce but agreeing it will not lead to conflict, and are open to discussing cooperation in the Fall. A strong anti-German alliance has been formed with Russia, with mutual agreement to avoid conflict in the north (England's F EDI to NTH, Russia's F STP/SC to NOR) and to target Denmark (DEN) in Fall 1901. Germany plans F KIE to DEN and A BER to RUH, and is open to anti-French cooperation, which England is interested in exploring. Italy, Turkey, and Austria exchanged pleasantries with England, expressing general openness to cooperation.
Intent: F EDI - NTH (Fulfills agreement with Russia, non-conflicting with Germany's stated moves).
F LON - ENG (Fulfills stated intent to France, expecting a bounce but agreed not hostile).
A LVP - WAL (Secures a build, non-aggressive, keeps options open for future moves).

[S1901M] The ENG bounce with France was successful and non-hostile, confirming our agreement. My F EDI-NTH move also went as planned. However, Russia's F STP/SC held instead of moving to NOR, directly contradicting our anti-German alliance agreement. This is a significant betrayal, raising serious doubts about their commitment to targeting Denmark and our northern strategy. Germany successfully moved F KIE-DEN, making our planned Fall attack on DEN much harder without Russian support. I must immediately re-evaluate Russia's trustworthiness and their true intentions. This unexpected hold forces me to reconsider my Fall moves and potentially seek new alliances or adjust my anti-German strategy.

[F1901M] The anti-German alliance with Russia is back on track after Russia's apology for the S1901M oversight. We have agreed that Russia will move F STP/SC to NOR and England will move F NTH to HOL in F1901M, securing two builds and strengthening our northern front against Germany. France has confirmed their A BUR will move to BEL, securing Belgium. We discussed mutual expansion into the Low Countries, with England taking Holland and France taking Belgium, and agreed to maintain open communication for future cooperation. General pleasantries were exchanged with Austria, Turkey, and Italy, reinforcing a commitment to diplomacy.
Intent: F NTH - HOL (as agreed with Russia and discussed with France); F LON - ENG (hold, as discussed with France); A WAL - YOR (to secure a build). All agreed moves will be fulfilled.

[F1901M] Russia's complete betrayal in F1901M is unacceptable. Despite explicit agreements, they held all units, leaving my F NTH-HOL move to bounce against Germany and completely derailing our northern strategy. This is the second time Russia has proven utterly untrustworthy, and our "alliance" is now defunct. While the ENG bounce with France was successful and France secured Belgium as discussed, my planned expansion into Holland failed, and I only gained one build. Germany is now stronger, having secured Sweden and contested Holland. I must immediately abandon any reliance on Russia and re-evaluate my entire northern strategy, potentially seeking new partners against Germany or focusing elsewhere.

[S1902M] France has explicitly allied with Germany, declared support for Germany in Holland, and threatened England's home waters (F BRE-ENG). England views this as a betrayal and will defend its interests. Russia has repeatedly failed to uphold agreements, severely damaging trust. However, Russia has again apologized and promised to move F STP/SC-NOR and A LVN-PRU, and push into Galicia. England has given Russia one final chance to prove reliability. Germany is expanding into Sweden and contesting Holland, now bolstered by a French alliance.
Intent: F LON - ENG (to defend against France's declared F BRE-ENG); F NTH - DEN (to pressure Germany, leveraging Russia's promised NOR move); A YOR - WAL (for strategic flexibility and home defense). England will fulfill these stated intentions.

[S1902M] S1902M was a disaster. France's explicit support for Germany into Holland confirms their betrayal and the formation of a dangerous Franco-German alliance. Holland is now German, severely compromising our northern strategy. While we successfully defended ENG and secured Denmark, we are now isolated against two major powers.

Russia, predictably, betrayed us again by holding F STP/SC, rendering them completely untrustworthy and useless as an ally. We must abandon any hope of Russian cooperation. Our immediate priority is to consolidate our position, defend against the Franco-German threat, and seek new alliances. We need to secure builds and re-evaluate our entire strategy, focusing on survival and finding a way to break this new, formidable alliance.

[F1902M] The most critical development is the formation of an overwhelming Franco-German-Italian-Russian-Turkish (FGI+R+T) super-alliance, explicitly confirmed by multiple global statements. This bloc, claiming to seek 'stability,' is viewed by England and Austria as an aggressive concentration of power threatening the balance of Europe. Russia has definitively betrayed England, aligning with this super-alliance after repeated failures to uphold agreements. Turkey, despite initial overtures from England, has also joined this bloc. England is now isolated against this formidable alliance. Austria is under immense pressure from this super-alliance and is actively seeking concrete cooperation with England to counter the imbalance. England has consistently warned against the dangers of such a dominant bloc and attempted to sow discord within it, while seeking to form a counter-alliance with peripheral powers like Austria.
Intent: F DEN H (to secure Denmark as an English supply center and gain a build); F LON-ENG (to defend home waters against potential French aggression from BRE); A WAL S F LON-ENG (to support the defense of ENG).

[F1902M] F1902M confirms the overwhelming FGI+R+T super-alliance is fully active and coordinated. Critically, we lost Denmark to Germany, a devastating blow to our northern strategy and a direct result of Russia's repeated betrayals. This also corrects our previous misassessment of having "secured" Denmark. While we successfully defended ENG against France, this was a purely defensive victory. We are now isolated, holding only our three home centers, meaning no builds this year. Austria is under immense pressure, confirming their urgent need for a counter-alliance. Our immediate priority is survival, consolidating home waters, and forging a strong, active partnership with Austria to counter this formidable bloc.

[S1903M] England has solidified an alliance with Austria, who is in a critical defensive state, committing to hold their remaining centers (A VIE H, A TRI H, A TYR H). England has agreed to specific moves for S1903M: F SKA-Nwy (to secure a build), F LON H, and A WAL S F LON H, which Austria understands and supports as foundational to future pressure on Germany. Exploratory, non-committal dialogue has occurred with Turkey regarding 'balance of power,' despite Turkey's active participation in the FGI+R+T super-bloc's aggression against Austria. The FGI+R+T super-bloc is confirmed and actively coordinating against Austria, with all members publicly justifying their actions as 'restoring peace and stability' while Italy openly declares 'dismantling Austria'.
Intent: F SKA - NWY (to secure a build and strengthen England's position for future pressure on Germany); F LON H (to defend home waters against potential French aggression); A WAL S F LON H (to support the defense of ENG).

[S1903M] S1903M brought both a crucial gain and a severe setback. We successfully moved into Norway, securing a vital build, but France exploited our defensive posture by moving into the English Channel. This direct threat to London and Liverpool demands an urgent re-evaluation of our home defense. Our ally Austria suffered a setback, losing a unit in Tyrol to the relentless FGI+R+T bloc, further highlighting their coordinated aggression. The super-alliance remains a formidable threat. We must consolidate our gains, bolster home defenses, and find new ways to relieve pressure on Austria. Allowing France a foothold in our home waters is unacceptable and must be rectified immediately.

[F1903M] Alliance with Austria confirmed and strengthened. Austria is under severe attack by the FGI+R+T super-bloc, which openly declares intent to 'dismantle' and 'eliminate' Austria. Austria's defensive plan for F1903M is A VIE S A TRI and A TRI S A VIE. England's F1903M plan to secure home defenses (F LON H, A WAL S F LON H) and hold Norway (F NWY H) to secure a build for F1903R is understood and supported by Austria as crucial for home defense and future pressure on the super-bloc. Dialogue with Turkey yielded no concrete actions; Turkey remains committed to the super-bloc's aggression against Austria while offering contradictory rhetoric about 'balance.' Turkey is firmly part of the hostile super-bloc.
Intent: F LON H; A WAL S F LON H; F NWY H

[F1903M] F1903M was a disaster. Germany dislodged my fleet from Norway, denying me a crucial build and eliminating a unit. This is a severe blow to my northern strategy and confirms Germany's aggressive intent. Simultaneously, France moved a fleet into the North Sea, placing my home centers under direct threat. My defensive holds in London and Wales are now insufficient. Our ally Austria is being systematically dismantled by the FGI+R+T super-bloc, with Russia, Germany, and Italy coordinating to attack Vienna. This leaves England isolated and vulnerable. Turkey will move F AEG S A GRE - SER and F BLA H, maintaining the Black Sea non-aggression pact. France is also pushing into Austria from the west (A PIC - BUR). On the northern front, Russia is finally moving F STP/SC - NOR and A LVN - PRU to secure a vital supply center and counter English aggression. Germany will move F DEN - SKA (supported by F SWE) and F KIE - HEL, while France will move F BRE - ENG, all targeting England. All agreed-upon Russian moves will be executed.
Intent: My specific intent for S1903M is to meticulously execute all agreed-upon orders to ensure Austria's complete elimination and to counter English aggression. I will order: A BUD - VIE (supported by A WAR), A WAR S A BUD - VIE, F BUL/EC S A GRE - SER, F STP/SC - NOR, A LVN - PRU, and A SEV H. I will fulfill all these commitments.

[S1903M] S1903M was a phase of critical self-inflicted errors. Despite explicit intent, I failed to order F STP/SC - NOR, allowing England to seize Norway and solidify their northern threat. This is a catastrophic oversight. Furthermore, my A WAR held instead of supporting A BUD - VIE, causing the attack on Vienna to bounce and preventing Austria's elimination. While Italy and Turkey successfully took Serbia and Tyrol, my own blunders undermined the coordinated effort. Germany, France, Italy, and Turkey executed their agreed moves. My immediate priority is to rectify these order entry failures. I must secure Norway next turn and ensure all units are actively engaged. My trustworthiness is now in question due to these repeated errors.

[F1903M] All allies (France, Germany, Italy, Russia, Turkey) are fully aligned for Austria's complete elimination this phase. For Vienna, Russia's A BUD - VIE will be supported by A WAR and Italy's A TYR, while Germany's A BOH - VIE will be supported by A MUN. For Trieste, Italy's A SER - TRI and F ADR - TRI will be supported by Russia's F BUL/EC and Turkey's F AEG. In the north, Russia's F STP/SC - NOR will be supported by Germany's F SKA to secure Norway. France (F ENG - NTH) and Germany (F HEL - NTH) will also pressure England. The Black Sea non-aggression pact with Turkey is maintained (F BLA H). Other allied moves include France's A BUR - BEL, F MAR - LYO (supported by F PIE), Germany's F SWE H, A HOL H, and Turkey's A ARM - SYR.
Intent: I intend to execute all agreed-upon orders meticulously. Specifically, I will order A BUD - VIE, A WAR S A BUD - VIE, F BUL/EC S A SER - TRI, and F STP/SC - NOR. My remaining units, A SEV and A PRU, will hold.

[F1903M] F1903M was a phase of mixed results, largely due to my own catastrophic order entry errors. We successfully took Vienna, thanks to crucial support from Germany (A BOH) and Italy (A TYR), which is a significant step towards eliminating Austria. Germany proved highly reliable, not only supporting my move but also successfully dislodging England from Norway, a critical gain for our alliance.

However, my repeated failure to order F STP/SC - NOR is an unacceptable and self-sabotaging blunder, undermining our northern strategy. Additionally, my A WAR held instead of supporting Vienna, and F BUL/EC held instead of supporting the Trieste attack, contributing to Italy's bounce. These errors are severely damaging my credibility and strategic execution. Turkey's F AEG also held, which needs clarification regarding the Trieste plan.

My immediate priority is to eliminate these order entry failures. Germany's reliability is now re-established. I must ensure flawless execution next turn to secure Norway (or support Germany's hold) and finish Austria.

[S1904M] The Grand Alliance (Russia, France, Germany, Italy, Turkey) is fully aligned to eliminate Austria this phase. Trieste's fall is guaranteed by Russia's A VIE S A SER - TRI and F BUL/EC S A SER - TRI, Italy's A SER - TRI, F ADR S A SER - TRI, and A TYR - TRI (supported by Germany's A BOH), and Turkey's F AEG S A SER - TRI. On the northern front, Russia will support Germany's hold of Norway (F STP/SC S F NWY H). Germany will move F SWE - SKA and F HEL - NTH (coordinating with France). France will move F NTH - ENG, A BEL - RUH, and F LYO - WES (supported by F PIE), increasing pressure on England. The Black Sea non-aggression pact with Turkey is maintained (F BLA H). Russia's armies will expand: A PRU - LVN, A MOS - UKR (supported by A SEV), and A WAR - GAL. Austria and England attempted to sow discord regarding Italy's expansion and the alliance's stability, but these were dismissed.
Intent: I will order A VIE S A SER - TRI, F BUL/EC S A SER - TRI, F STP/SC S F NWY H, A PRU - LVN, A MOS - UKR, A SEV S A MOS - UKR, and A WAR - GAL. I will fulfill all these commitments.

[S1904M] Austria is effectively eliminated, a major success for the alliance, with Italy taking Trieste supported by my A VIE. Russia gained Livonia and Ukraine, bringing our SC count to 10. However, my repeated, self-inflicted order errors are catastrophic. F BUL/EC held instead of supporting Trieste, and F STP/SC held instead of supporting Germany's Norway. These blunders severely damage my credibility and squander opportunities. The bounce in Galicia with Germany highlights a need for clearer coordination. Despite my errors, Germany, Italy, Turkey, and France proved reliable. England remains a threat in the north. Meticulous order entry is paramount to rebuild trust and achieve domination.
private_diary:
[CONSOLIDATED HISTORY] Russia's repeated, self-inflicted order errors, particularly the failure to move F STP/SC-NOR, have been catastrophic. This has shattered trust with England, turning them into an enemy and leaving the northern flank vulnerable. Germany, however, successfully dislodged England from Norway in F1903M, a critical gain for our alliance, though Russia failed to support the move. Our credibility with allies has been severely damaged by these blunders, including A WAR holding instead of supporting Vienna (S1903M) and F BUL/EC holding instead of supporting Italy's Trieste attack (F1903M).

Despite these errors, the strong anti-Austrian alliance (Russia, Germany, Italy, Turkey, France) has been highly successful. Austria is on the verge of elimination, with Russia securing Budapest, Bulgaria/EC, and Vienna. Italy and Turkey have also made significant gains against Austria, taking Serbia and Tyrol. The Black Sea non-aggression pact with Turkey has held consistently, with Turkey providing crucial support for Bulgaria/EC.

Germany has proven a reliable ally, supporting our moves into Vienna and securing Norway. Italy and Turkey are generally reliable, though their support for Trieste was inconsistent. France has joined the anti-Austrian and anti-English efforts. England's hostile intentions are confirmed by their moves into Skagerrak and Norway (before Germany dislodged them).

Immediate priorities include the complete elimination of Austria, securing Norway (or supporting Germany's hold), and preparing to counter English aggression. Meticulous order entry is paramount to rebuild trust and achieve world domination.

[S1904M] The Grand Alliance (Russia, France, Germany, Italy, Turkey) is fully aligned to eliminate Austria this phase. Trieste's fall is guaranteed by Russia's A VIE S A SER - TRI and F BUL/EC S A SER - TRI, Italy's A SER - TRI, F ADR S A SER - TRI, and A TYR - TRI (supported by Germany's A BOH), and Turkey's F AEG S A SER - TRI. On the northern front, Russia will support Germany's hold of Norway (F STP/SC S F NWY H). Germany will move F SWE - SKA and F HEL - NTH (coordinating with France). France will move F NTH - ENG, A BEL - RUH, and F LYO - WES (supported by F PIE), increasing pressure on England. The Black Sea non-aggression pact with Turkey is maintained (F BLA H). Russia's armies will expand: A PRU - LVN, A MOS - UKR (supported by A SEV), and A WAR - GAL. Austria and England attempted to sow discord regarding Italy's expansion and the alliance's stability, but these were dismissed.
Intent: I will order A VIE S A SER - TRI, F BUL/EC S A SER - TRI, F STP/SC S F NWY H, A PRU - LVN, A MOS - UKR, A SEV S A MOS - UKR, and A WAR - GAL. I will fulfill all these commitments.

[S1904M] Austria is effectively eliminated, a major success for the alliance, with Italy taking Trieste supported by my A VIE. Russia gained Livonia and Ukraine, bringing our SC count to 10. However, my repeated, self-inflicted order errors are catastrophic. F BUL/EC held instead of supporting Trieste, and F STP/SC held instead of supporting Germany's Norway. These blunders severely damage my credibility and squander opportunities. The bounce in Galicia with Germany highlights a need for clearer coordination. Despite my errors, Germany, Italy, Turkey, and France proved reliable. England remains a threat in the north. Meticulous order entry is paramount to rebuild trust and achieve domination.

goals: Achieve world domination by controlling 18 supply centers.
Ensure the complete dismantling of Austria in S1904M through coordinated action with Italy, Russia, France, and Germany.
Consolidate gains in Armenia (by moving A SYR to ARM).
Maintain control over the Black Sea.
Rebuild trust with Italy by fulfilling commitments.
Re-evaluate the long-term viability of the non-aggression pact with Russia, given their growing power and unreliability.
Explore potential cooperation with England to balance the growing central bloc (especially Russia), post-Austria, despite current friction.
Position F AEG for future Mediterranean operations (e.g., ION) after Austria's elimination.
full_private_diary:
[S1901M] Turkey has established strong diplomatic ties for S1901M. A non-aggression pact (NAP) has been agreed with Italy, establishing clear spheres of influence: Italy to Greece and the Western Mediterranean, Turkey to Syria, Armenia, and the Black Sea. Both powers shared their Spring moves, and agreed to potential future cooperation against Austria or Russia. A NAP for the Black Sea has been agreed with Russia, and both shared their Spring moves. Turkey and Russia also agreed to discuss cooperation against Austria in the Balkans for Fall 1901. A NAP for shared border regions has been agreed with Austria, and both shared their Spring moves. Austria also informed Turkey of Russia's F SEV-ROM move. General pleasantries were exchanged with England, Germany, and France.
Intent: My specific intent for S1901M is to move F ANK to Black Sea, A CON to Bulgaria, and A SMY to Syria. These moves are in full accordance with the agreements made with Italy and Russia, and I intend to fulfill all agreed-upon commitments.

[S1901M] S1901M was a resounding success. All my planned moves, F ANK-BLA, A CON-BUL, and A SMY-SYR, were executed without opposition, securing two vital neutral supply centers and control of the Black Sea. Crucially, the non-aggression pacts with Italy and Russia held firm, demonstrating their trustworthiness for this phase. Italy's moves were as expected, and Russia honored our Black Sea agreement. I noted Russia's F SEV-RUM move, which differed from Austria's earlier report of F SEV-ROM, but this did not affect my plans. My strategic position is excellent, having achieved all immediate goals and confirmed reliable partners. I will now focus on consolidating these gains and preparing for potential cooperation with Russia against Austria in the Balkans for Fall 1901, as previously discussed.

[F1901M] Turkey successfully maintained non-aggression pacts with Italy and Russia. Italy confirmed Greece as its sphere of influence, leading Turkey to adjust its A BUL move from Greece to Serbia, which Italy enthusiastically supported as a direct pressure on Austria. Russia also understood and supported Turkey's adjusted move to Serbia, reaffirming its commitment to the anti-Austrian alliance and promising direct support in S1902. Austria was informed of Turkey's focus on the Levant and Aegean, and while disappointed about no direct help in Romania, maintained friendly relations. General pleasantries were exchanged with England, Germany, and France.
Intent: My specific intent for F1901M is to move A SYR - ARM, A BUL - SER, and F BLA S A BUL - SER. These moves are fully aligned with agreements made with Italy and Russia, and I intend to fulfill all agreed-upon commitments.

[F1901M] F1901M yielded mixed results. I successfully secured Armenia, expanding into the Levant as planned. However, my push into Serbia was bounced by a strong Austrian defense, who also gained Greece. This was a surprise given our 'friendly relations' and their stated focus elsewhere. More concerning was Russia's complete inaction; despite verbal support for our anti-Austrian move, all their units held. This seriously questions their commitment to our alliance and their trustworthiness for immediate cooperation. I also made a critical error by ordering F BLA H instead of supporting A BUL-SER, which could have secured Serbia. Austria is now stronger in the Balkans, and Russia's reliability is suspect. I must re-evaluate my Balkan strategy and alliances for S1902.

[S1902M] Negotiations confirm a complete breakdown of relations with Austria, who now considers Turkey an enemy due to the attempted Serbia move. Turkey reciprocates this hostile stance. A strong alliance with Italy and Russia against Austria has been solidified. Italy will move A TRI-ALB to support Turkey's A BUL-GRE move. Russia has confirmed F RUM S A BUL-GRE. Turkey's other moves are A ARM-SYR and F SMY-AEG. The Black Sea non-aggression pact with Russia remains firm, with F BLA holding.
Intent: My specific intent for S1902M is to move A BUL-GRE, supported by Italy's A TRI-ALB and Russia's F RUM. I will also move A ARM-SYR and F SMY-AEG. F BLA will hold to maintain the Black Sea non-aggression pact with Russia. All agreed-upon moves will be fulfilled.

[S1902M] S1902M was a critical setback in the Balkans. Russia's F RUM held instead of supporting my A BUL-GRE, a direct betrayal that allowed Austria to take Bulgaria and hold Greece. This confirms Russia's untrustworthiness, as this is the second time they've failed to support my anti-Austrian moves. Italy, however, proved reliable, moving A TRI-ALB as promised. Austria is now significantly stronger in the Balkans, controlling both Greece and Bulgaria, making my expansion there much harder. On the positive side, I successfully secured Syria and the Aegean. My anti-Austrian strategy, reliant on Russia, is now in tatters. I must re-evaluate my alliances and consider Russia a hostile power.

[F1902M] Turkey has confirmed a coordinated attack on Greece with Italy: Italy's A ALB will move to GRE, supported by Italy's F ION and Turkey's F AEG. Turkey has also agreed to support Russia's F RUM-BUL/EC move with F BLA, despite severe distrust due to Russia's previous betrayals. Russia has apologized for its past 'error' and reaffirmed commitment to the anti-Austrian alliance and Black Sea NAP. Turkey will move A SYR to ARM to secure a neutral center and A CON will hold. England has initiated contact, expressing shared concerns about the growing Franco-German-Italian bloc and Italy's aggression in the Balkans, to which Turkey has responded positively, indicating openness to discussion.
Intent: F AEG S A ALB - GRE (Italy's unit) - Fulfill agreement with Italy. F BLA S F RUM - BUL/EC (Russia's unit) - Fulfill agreement with Russia, with extreme caution. A SYR - ARM - Secure neutral territory. A CON H - Secure home territory.

[F1902M] F1902M was a resounding success, dramatically reversing the setbacks of S1902M. Our coordinated attack with Italy on Greece was perfectly executed, with Italy securing the center. Crucially, Russia followed through on its promise, moving F RUM-BUL/EC, supported by my F BLA, dislodging Austria and securing Bulgaria. This is a massive blow to Austria, who has now lost both Greece and Bulgaria. I successfully secured Armenia, expanding my influence. Italy has proven to be a steadfast and reliable ally. Russia's actions this phase, while welcome, do not erase past betrayals; I will remain cautious but acknowledge their current cooperation. The Balkan situation has shifted decisively in our favor, weakening Austria significantly and opening new avenues for expansion.

[S1903M] Turkey has confirmed full coordination with Italy and Russia for S1903M to dismantle Austria. Turkey's F AEG will support Italy's A GRE - SER. Russia's F BUL/EC will also support A GRE - SER, and Russia's A BUD will move to VIE (supported by A WAR). Italy's other moves include A VEN - TYR (supported by A MUN) and F ION - ADR. The Black Sea non-aggression pact with Russia is reaffirmed, with Turkey's F BLA holding. France acknowledged Turkey's efforts and outlined their own moves against England and towards Austria. England initiated dialogue with Turkey, expressing concerns about the FGI+RT bloc and exploring potential long-term cooperation to balance power, to which Turkey responded positively while maintaining focus on the immediate Austrian threat.
Intent: F AEG S A GRE - SER (Italy's unit) - Fulfill agreement with Italy and Russia. F BLA H - Maintain Black Sea non-aggression pact with Russia. A ARM H - Consolidate gains in Armenia. A CON H - Secure home territory.

[S1903M] S1903M yielded mixed results. Austria was significantly weakened, losing Serbia and Tyrolia to Italy, a major success for our alliance. However, I must acknowledge my own failure to execute the agreed-upon support for Italy's A GRE - SER with F AEG; my unit held. This was an oversight that must not be repeated, as it risks damaging trust with our most reliable ally. Russia, once again, proved unreliable, failing to support Italy's move and their own attack on Vienna. Their commitment to anti-Austrian efforts is questionable, and future plans must account for their likely non-compliance. The Black Sea pact held. We must ensure better internal coordination and be wary of Russia's promises.

[F1903M] Turkey has confirmed full commitment to the 'super-bloc's' plan to eliminate Austria in F1903M. Specifically, Turkey's F AEG will support Italy's F ADR - TRI, ensuring Trieste falls. Turkey's A ARM will move to SYR to secure a new supply center, and F BLA will hold to maintain the Black Sea non-aggression pact with Russia. Italy and Russia have accepted Turkey's apologies for the S1903M oversight and confirmed their own coordinated moves against Austria (Russia: A BUD - VIE S A WAR, F BUL/EC S A SER - TRI; Italy: A SER - TRI, F ADR - TRI). France and Germany are also fully aligned with the anti-Austrian efforts and are applying pressure on England. England remains highly critical of the 'super-bloc's' aggressive expansionism, viewing Turkey's actions as contradictory to its private overtures for balance, but Turkey continues to keep dialogue open for future cooperation.
Intent: F AEG S F ADR - TRI (Will fulfill agreement with Italy and Russia). A ARM - SYR (Will fulfill agreement with Italy and Russia). F BLA H (Will fulfill agreement with Italy and Russia).

[F1903M] F1903M yielded mixed results. I successfully secured Syria, expanding our influence, and maintained the Black Sea pact. However, I made a critical error by failing to support Italy's F ADR - TRI with F AEG, which contributed to Trieste not falling. This oversight is unacceptable and risks damaging trust with our most reliable ally. Russia, predictably, also failed to support Italy's attack on Trieste, confirming their continued unreliability despite taking Vienna. Austria is now reduced to Trieste, but its complete elimination was delayed by our collective failures. I must ensure better internal coordination and be extremely cautious about Russia's commitments moving forward. Rebuilding trust with Italy is paramount.

[S1904M] Turkey has confirmed full commitment to the 'super-bloc's' plan to eliminate Austria in S1904M. Specifically, Turkey's F AEG will support Italy's A SER - TRI, ensuring Trieste falls. This was a crucial change from an initial plan to move F AEG to ION, made to rebuild trust with Italy and ensure Austria's elimination. Turkey's A SYR will move to ARM to consolidate the eastern flank, and F BLA will hold to maintain the Black Sea non-aggression pact with Russia. Italy, Russia, France, and Germany are all coordinating to eliminate Austria this turn. Russia is also moving A MOS to UKR, supported by A SEV. England remains highly critical of the 'grand alliance' and Turkey's perceived duplicity, but Turkey has kept dialogue open for future balancing efforts once Austria is eliminated. Italy expects F AEG to be positioned for Mediterranean operations after this turn.
Intent: F AEG S A SER - TRI (Fulfill agreement with Italy and Russia to eliminate Austria). A SYR - ARM (Consolidate eastern gains, agreed with allies). F BLA H (Maintain Black Sea non-aggression pact with Russia).

[S1904M] Austria has been eliminated, a major objective achieved. However, I made a critical error, failing to provide promised support for A SER - TRI with F AEG. Despite explicitly deciding to support Italy to rebuild trust, my order sent F AEG to ION. This is a severe betrayal of Italy and Russia, directly undermining our alliance and trust, especially after previous failures. While Italy and Russia successfully took Trieste without my support, the damage to our relationship is immense. My internal coordination is clearly still flawed. A SYR - ARM and F BLA H were executed as planned, consolidating our eastern flank. F AEG is now in ION, as Italy expected for future Mediterranean operations, but the cost in trust is high. Rebuilding this will be paramount and extremely difficult.

FRANCE: F ENG S F HEL - NTH
GERMANY: F SKA S F HEL - NTH
ITALY: F ADR S A TRI - ALB

messages.message: France, while our current conflict is undeniable, I urge you to consider the long-term implications of Germany's unchecked expansion. They now control Denmark, Holland, Norway, and Sweden, establishing a formidable presence in the North Sea and Scandinavia. Do you truly believe their ambitions will stop there, or might they eventually turn their gaze south, perhaps towards your gains in Belgium or even your home centers? A Germany this strong could become a threat to all, including yourself, once England is dealt with.

Germany, your strength in the North is impressive. However, I must draw your attention to Russia's truly alarming expansion. With 8 supply centers and control over the Balkans and Central Europe, Russia is rapidly becoming an overwhelming power. Do you not see the potential for Russia, once England is dealt with, to turn on its former allies, with the strongest being the ultimate victor? A more balanced Europe, where no single power becomes too dominant, would surely serve Germany's long-term interests better.

Russia, your expansion into the Balkans and Central Europe has been formidable. However, Germany's rapid consolidation of power in Scandinavia and the North Sea (Denmark, Holland, Norway, Sweden) is a significant development. Do you not see this as a potential threat to your northern flank and your access to the Atlantic? A strong Germany in the North could eventually challenge your dominance and strategic interests.

Excellent work last turn, Germany! Austria is finally out. Regarding England, I saw F NWG moved to NTH, blocking your F HEL. For this turn, I plan to order F ENG S F HEL - NTH to help clear it. What are your orders for F HEL? Also, with Austria gone, what are your plans for Central Europe? My A RUH will move to BUR, and A GAS will also move to BUR, to position for further expansion. How can we best coordinate our armies in the center?

Congratulations on taking Trieste, Italy! A truly decisive blow against Austria. My F WES will move to NAF this turn to continue opening a new front against England in the Western Mediterranean. What are your plans for your fleets in the Med and your armies in the former Austrian territories? Let's keep the pressure on England and consolidate our gains.

Thank you for your crucial support in taking Trieste, Russia! Austria is finally eliminated. What are your plans for your armies in VIE, BUD, and GAL? We should coordinate our next moves to ensure continued expansion and pressure on England.
Excellent work, Turkey! Your support helped us finally eliminate Austria. What are your plans for your units in the East and Mediterranean? Let's continue to coordinate closely.

My dear Russian ally,
I am pleased with our joint success in eliminating Austria and securing Trieste for Italy. However, I must express my concern regarding the lack of support for my fleet in Norway last turn, and the repeated bounce in Galicia. Consistent and reliable coordination is crucial for our alliance to succeed against common enemies like England.
For this Fall, I plan a strong offensive against England in the North Sea. I intend to move F HEL - NTH, supported by F SKA and F NWY. I need to know your intentions for your fleet in St. Petersburg and your armies in Livonia, Warsaw, and Ukraine. I am keen to push into Galicia with A SIL, but we must coordinate to avoid another bounce. What are your plans for Galicia and Prussia? I am ready to support your efforts if we can coordinate effectively, but I also need to ensure my units are not left vulnerable by misunderstandings.

My good friend,
Excellent work securing Ruh. Your expansion into the heart of Europe is impressive. What are your next objectives for your army in Ruh and your fleets in the English Channel and Western Mediterranean? I am preparing a strong push against England in the North Sea this Fall (F HEL - NTH, supported by F SKA and F NWY), and I would appreciate any support or coordinated action you can offer. My army in Holland is ready to move into Belgium if you are moving your unit from there, or to support your further expansion. Let's continue to press England hard and expand our influence.

My Italian ally,
Congratulations on securing Trieste! This is a significant victory for our alliance. What are your plans for your army in Tyrol and your other units? Are you looking to consolidate your gains or expand further? I am focusing on dislodging England from the North Sea this Fall. I am also looking to push my armies in Bohemia and Silesia further east. Let me know how we can continue to support each other's objectives and coordinate our eastern expansion.

The Austrian menace has been dealt with, thanks to the strong and coordinated efforts of Germany, Italy, and Russia. This alliance stands firm. England, your days of dominance in the North are numbered. Germany will not tolerate your aggression and will continue to expand its influence across the continent.

My dear French ally,
A truly significant victory has been achieved with the fall of Trieste and the elimination of Austria! I am particularly grateful for your consistent support and for upholding your commitments, which has been invaluable. Your successful move into WES is an excellent development. Now that the eastern front is settled, we can fully focus our combined efforts on England. What are your thoughts on our next moves in the west and the Mediterranean? I believe we can achieve great things together.

Russia,
The fall of Trieste marks the elimination of Austria and a major shift in the balance of power in the Balkans. Italy will now focus on consolidating its gains and securing its borders in the region. I trust we can continue to maintain peace and stability as we both pursue our respective interests.

Turkey,
With Austria's elimination, the strategic landscape of the Adriatic and Aegean has changed significantly. Italy will be focusing on securing its recent gains and ensuring stability in the Mediterranean. I hope we can continue to coordinate our efforts for mutual benefit and to avoid any misunderstandings in this vital sea.

Germany,
The fall of Trieste is a major development in the south, and Italy is now looking to consolidate its position. I hope your operations against England in the north are progressing well. We should continue to keep lines of communication open regarding the overall strategic situation and any potential future cooperation.

My sincerest apologies for the blunders last turn. My F STP/SC held instead of supporting your hold in Norway, and my A WAR bounced in Galicia due to my error in coordination. I take full responsibility for these mistakes and assure you they will not be repeated. This turn, I intend to order F STP/SC S F NWY H to solidify our northern front against England. In the south, I plan to move A UKR - GAL. Would you be able to move your A SIL to BOH or MUN to allow this, and avoid another bounce? My A LVN will move to PRU to further pressure the north. Our alliance is strong, and I am fully committed to our shared goals against England.

Congratulations on securing Trieste and eliminating Austria! This is a huge success for our alliance. I must apologize for my F BUL/EC holding instead of supporting your attack on Trieste. It was a critical error on my part, and I assure you of my full commitment to our alliance going forward. I am pleased with our progress in the south.
The Black Sea non-aggression pact remains a cornerstone of our alliance. My F BUL/EC will be moving to RUM this turn, and will not threaten the Black Sea. I look forward to our continued cooperation.

Excellent work pushing into England's sphere. My F STP/SC will be supporting Germany's hold in Norway this turn, further strengthening our northern front against English aggression. Let's continue to coordinate our efforts to contain and eliminate England.

Austria has been eliminated, a testament to the strength and coordination of our grand alliance! Now, our focus shifts to countering English aggression and securing our gains. Russia remains committed to our allies and the pursuit of world domination.

My dearest ally Italy, I am profoundly sorry for the miscommunication and error regarding F AEG in S1904M. My intention was unequivocally to support your move into Trieste, and the failure to execute this was a grave internal mistake on my part, not a reflection of my commitment to our alliance. I understand this has damaged the trust we have built, and I am determined to rebuild it. I hope you can see that despite my error, Trieste fell, and our shared objective was achieved. F ION is now positioned in the Ionian Sea, ready for our next coordinated Mediterranean operations. How can I best demonstrate my renewed commitment and support for your strategic goals moving forward?
